# Vendored FlashInfer Headers

This directory contains the FlashInfer CUDA headers needed by
`sampling/bench_sampling.cu`, copied from:

```text
https://github.com/flashinfer-ai/flashinfer
commit 42bf79e9fd00a3c657d23ff3cc54886eea33473e
```

Only headers and the upstream license are vendored. No FlashInfer Python package
or binary artifact is required to build the standalone sampling benchmark.
